sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n111320" key="filomo/naxos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φῐλο-μόνᾰχος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, prob. <sense id="n111320.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">f.l. for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">-μονόμαχος</ref></xr>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fond of gladiators,</tr_> or for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">-μαχος,</foreign> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fond of fighting,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cat.Cod.Astr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8(2).86</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
